pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade the Jakarta EE API dependency from version 9 to 10 to support the new Java version.
Upgrade the MicroProfile specification version from 5.0 to 6.1 to match the new Jakarta EE level.
Upgrade the Payara Micro application server to a version compatible with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 10.
Upgrade the Payara Micro Maven plugin to version 2.0 to support the new server version and build process.
Upgrade SLF4J logging API to a newer version for security and compatibility.
Add Log4j 2 as a logging implementation dependency for test scope.
Upgrade JUnit 5 to a newer version for improved test framework features.
Add AssertJ as a test assertion library dependency.
Upgrade RestAssured to a newer version for API testing.
Add Jackson JSON binding dependencies for system tests.
Upgrade internal common library dependencies to version 1.2.0.
Upgrade the Maven Compiler Plugin to support Java 21 compilation.
Upgrade the Maven Surefire Plugin to a stable release version.
Upgrade the Maven Failsafe Plugin to a stable release version.
Upgrade the Fabric8 Docker Maven Plugin to a newer version.
Upgrade the custom Compose Maven Plugin to a newer version.
Upgrade the custom Helm Maven Plugin to a newer version.
Add OWASP Dependency Check plugin for security vulnerability scanning.
Upgrade JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting.
Upgrade SonarQube scanner plugin for code quality analysis.
Add support for multi-architecture Docker images (AMD64 and ARM64).
Refactor Kubernetes configuration properties to use variables and update namespace.
Add SLF4J to JDK14 binding to redirect logs to the default Java logger in Payara.
Add JCL over SLF4J bridge to redirect Apache Commons Logging to SLF4J.
Move plugin executions from profiles to the main build section for consistency.
Enable resource filtering for main resources to allow property substitution.
Removed the entire Docker Compose-based integration test pipeline, including resource copying, container lifecycle management, and associated system test execution.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed maven-resources-plugin executions for compose, compose-maven-plugin, and failsafe-plugin executions tied to docker-compose.

pom.xml.general_idea: Removed JaCoCo code coverage plugin configuration and agent copying logic from the build process.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed maven-dependency-plugin execution for jacoco agent and jacoco-maven-plugin executions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Removed SonarQube scanner plugin execution from the verify phase.
Simplified the Docker Maven plugin configuration by removing explicit build/push executions and adding multi-platform buildx support.
pom.xml.human_impl: Replaced docker-maven-plugin executions with static configuration including <buildx> and <platforms>.

pom.xml.general_idea: Added explicit skip properties for various plugins in the integration-test-stage profile to ensure clean skipping.
Simplified the Helm deployment workflow by removing manual resource copying and uninstall steps, relying on the helm-maven-plugin's pull and deploy goals.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed maven-resources-plugin for helm and helm-maven-plugin uninstall execution; kept pull and deploy.

pom.xml.general_idea: Moved failsafe plugin configuration from explicit executions to static configuration in the integration-test-stage profile.
pom.xml.human_impl: Moved <systemPropertyVariables> into <configuration> and removed explicit <execution> blocks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Added explicit pluginRepositories and repositories sections to resolve dependencies from the internal Nexus repository.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the flattened POM artifact to the gitignore to prevent committing generated dependency management files.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrote the README to provide detailed documentation on MicroProfile Config usage, build instructions, and local execution steps.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced brief summary with sections on Synopsis, Status, Release Information, and HOW-TO guides for building and running the app.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to support the target Java version.
Add new environment variables for artifact ID, git tagging, and OWASP scan configuration.
Add secrets for GitHub token and NIST NVD API key required for new build steps.
Update Maven command to use 'deploy' instead of 'install' and update property names for Sonar and OWASP.
Refactor version string generation to extract revision from POM and construct a full version string.
Add steps to tag the git repository with the project version and push to GitHub.
buildspec.yml.human_impl: git tag -a $PROJECT_VERSION ... git push origin HEAD:$VERSION_CHANGELIST $PROJECT_VERSION

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from a JRE 17 Alpine variant to a JRE 21 Alpine variant to run the application on Java 21.
Replace the default garbage collector with ZGC (Z Garbage Collector) which is a low-latency GC available in Java 21.
Explicitly set the file encoding to UTF-8 via JVM argument to ensure consistent character handling.

src/test/docker/cnj-config-backend-micro.general_idea: Removed the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml to align with modern Docker Compose specifications.
Updated the header comment to remove specific 'Java EE' reference, generalizing it to 'application'.
src/test/docker/cnj-config-backend-micro.human_impl: Changed comment from 'runnable Java EE application' to 'runnable application'
